title: The GitHub Blog
description: Updates, ideas, and inspiration from GitHub to help developers build and design software.

items.content:

items.title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with Markdown
items.content:
Discover how to format and edit your comments and posts using Markdown.

The post GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with Markdown appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
Discover how to format and edit your comments and posts using Markdown.
The post GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with Markdown appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Kedasha Kerr
items.summary: 本文面向GitHub初学者，介绍Markdown的基本使用方法。通过Markdown，用户可以学习如何格式化和编辑在GitHub上的评论与帖子，提升内容呈现效果。

items.title: Securing the git push pipeline: Responding to a critical remote code execution vulnerability
items.content:

items.title: An update on GitHub availability
items.content:
Here’s what we’ve done—and what we’re still doing—to improve our availability and reliability.

items.summary: GitHub发布博客文章，介绍其在提升平台可用性与可靠性方面已采取的措施及持续进行的工作。

items.title: GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing
items.content:
Starting June 1, your Copilot usage will consume GitHub AI Credits.

The post GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
Starting June 1, your Copilot usage will consume GitHub AI Credits.
The post GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Mario Rodriguez
items.summary: GitHub Copilot将于6月1日起采用基于使用量的计费模式，用户的使用将消耗GitHub AI积分。

items.title: Highlights from Git 2.54
items.content:
